name: GIGABYTE GA-H310TN Thin Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1151 - Intel H310 Chipset - Supports DDR4-2400 - 1x TPM 2.0 IC Onboard - 1x M.2 Socket1 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - HDMI - VGA - Dual Channel 24-bit LVDS - USB 3.0 - 19V DC-in Power Connector (H310TN)
shortName: GIGABYTE GA-H310TN Thin Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1151
description: Compact mini-ITX motherboard with dual display outputs for thin client and embedded systems.
